sentences.target: Die Angabe auf dem Formular fehlt.

translations.de: Die Angabe auf dem Formular fehlt.
translations.en: The info on the form is missing.
translations.fr: Il manque une information sur le formulaire.
translations.vi: Trong mẫu đơn còn thiếu thông tin.
translations.el: Λείπει μια πληροφορία από τη φόρμα.
translations.id: Ada informasi yang kurang di formulir.
translations.ja: フォームに情報が抜けています。

sentences.target: Meine Angabe war gestern leider falsch.

translations.de: Meine Angabe war gestern leider falsch.
translations.en: My information was unfortunately wrong yesterday.
translations.fr: Hier, j’ai donné une mauvaise information.
translations.zh-Hans: 我昨天提供了错误的信息。
translations.pt: Ontem eu passei uma informação errada.
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi cung cấp thông tin sai.
translations.nb: I går ga jeg feil informasjon.
translations.id: Kemarin saya memberikan informasi yang salah.
translations.sv: I går gav jag fel information.
translations.da: I går gav jeg forkert information.
translations.ja: 昨日、間違った情報を伝えてしまいました。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine singular nominative; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; preterite, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.
Stance/evaluative adverb; modifies the clause.
Predicative adjective; complements the copula 'war'.

sentences.target: Du brauchst eine Angabe für die Bestellung.
sentences.reading: /duː bʁaʊ̯xst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈaŋɡaːbə fyːʁ diː bəˈʃtɛlʊŋ/

translations.de: Du brauchst eine Angabe für die Bestellung.
translations.ipa: /duː bʁaʊ̯xst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈaŋɡaːbə fyːʁ diː bəˈʃtɛlʊŋ/
translations.en: You need information for the order.
translations.es: Necesitas un dato para el pedido.
translations.fr: Tu as besoin d’une info pour la commande.
translations.it: Per l’ordine ti serve un dato.
translations.zh-Hans: 下单需要提供一项信息。
translations.pt: Para o pedido, você precisa de uma informação.
translations.he: בשביל ההזמנה אתה צריך לתת פרט אחד.
translations.tr: Sipariş için bir bilgiye ihtiyacın var.
translations.vi: Để đặt hàng, bạn cần cung cấp một thông tin.
translations.nl: Voor de bestelling heb je een gegeven nodig.
translations.hu: A rendeléshez szükség van egy adatra.
translations.hi: ऑर्डर के लिए एक जानकारी चाहिए.
translations.el: Για την παραγγελία χρειάζεσαι μια πληροφορία.
translations.nb: Til bestillingen trenger du en opplysning.
translations.id: Untuk pesanan, kamu perlu satu keterangan.
translations.sv: För beställningen behöver du en uppgift.
translations.ro: Pentru comandă ai nevoie de o informație.
translations.da: Til bestillingen har du brug for en oplysning.
translations.ja: 注文には情報が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 2nd person singular present; transitive.
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'brauchst'.
Preposition; introduces a purpose/beneficiary PP; governs accusative.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner within the PP.
Common noun; feminine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Angabe stimmt, aber der Preis ist hoch.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈaŋɡaːbə ʃtɪmt, ˈaːbɐ deːʁ pʁaɪ̯s ɪst hoːx/

translations.de: Die Angabe stimmt, aber der Preis ist hoch.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈaŋɡaːbə ʃtɪmt, ˈaːbɐ deːʁ pʁaɪ̯s ɪst hoːx/
translations.en: The information is correct, but the price is high.
translations.es: La información es correcta, pero el precio es alto.
translations.fr: L’information est correcte, mais le prix est élevé.
translations.it: L’informazione è corretta, ma il prezzo è alto.
translations.zh-Hans: 信息是正确的，但价格很高。
translations.pt: A informação está correta, mas o preço é alto.
translations.vi: Thông tin đúng, nhưng giá cao.
translations.nl: De informatie klopt, maar de prijs is hoog.
translations.hu: Az információ helyes, de az ár magas.
translations.hi: जानकारी सही है, लेकिन कीमत ज्यादा है.
translations.pl: Informacja jest prawidłowa, ale cena jest wysoka.
translations.el: Η πληροφορία είναι σωστή, αλλά η τιμή είναι υψηλή.
translations.nb: Opplysningen stemmer, men prisen er høy.
translations.sv: Uppgiften stämmer, men priset är högt.
translations.ro: Informația e corectă, dar prețul e mare.
translations.cs: Údaj je správný, ale cena je vysoká.
translations.da: Oplysningen er korrekt, men prisen er høj.
translations.fi: Tiedot pitävät paikkansa, mutta hinta on korkea.
translations.ja: 情報は正しいですが、価格が高いです。
